name: molt-dispatch
description: A local-install Distributed Agent Compute Grid (DACG) — a pull-based broker that decomposes objectives into bounded work units, dispatches them to heterogeneous AI workers (Claude, Codex), validates results, and recomposes accepted artifacts.

scripts.test: node scripts/verify_grid.mjs && node scripts/verify_live.mjs && node scripts/verify_fuel.mjs && node scripts/verify_deliberation.mjs && node scripts/verify_objective_deps.mjs && node scripts/verify_integration_agent.mjs && node scripts/verify_planner_agent.mjs && node scripts/verify_deepseek_provider.mjs && node scripts/verify_bootstrap_key.mjs && node scripts/verify_open_contribution.mjs && node scripts/verify_security_hardening.mjs && node scripts/verify_ingress_hardening.mjs && node scripts/verify_b_exec.mjs && node scripts/verify_c_repln.mjs && node scripts/verify_prompt_safety.mjs
